prompt: Removing the top hierachy in the organization chart.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, an organization chart. Remove the single yellow-outlined person icon at the absolute top of the hierarchy, along with its connecting lines. The three blue-outlined person icons, currently in the second tier, should then become the new top tier of the chart, with the five red-outlined person icons correctly connected underneath them. Image 2, a black and white mask, can be used to precisely identify the locations of all individual nodes in the chart.
objects: yellow-outlined person icon (should not be present)
connecting lines from top yellow icon (should not be present)
three blue-outlined person icons at the top tier
five red-outlined person icons connected below the blue icons
